name: agent-tdd
description: TDD in the agent era — a wave-based human-agent test co-authoring workflow that orchestrates parallel test/impl agents under one Root.

interface.longDescription: Use Agent TDD to run a wave-based test-driven workflow: a Root agent spawns parallel test and implementation agents per issue, gates each wave on terminal status and merged PRs, and drives the work from a free-form spec or a planned GitHub issue.
defaultPrompt: Run Agent TDD on this feature.
Plan a bug fix with Agent TDD.
